title: CBRE Group 2024 Annual Report / Form 10-K
note: Primary filing source for CBRE's business segments, operating model, financial performance, and risk context.

title: CBRE Services
note: Company service page supporting the advisory, transaction, workplace, facilities, project, and outsourcing product descriptions.

title: CBRE Group Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization source used for the registry market-cap metric and S&P 500 snapshot context.

title: CBRE Group Statistics and Valuation
note: Current valuation-statistics source used for the approximate P/E ratio metric.

title: OpenStreetMap
note: Open geospatial data layer relevant to decentralized property discovery, mapping, and built-environment analysis.

title: openMAINT
note: Open-source property and facility management application relevant to owner-controlled facilities operations.

title: OpenProject Open Source Project Management Software
note: Open-source project management tool relevant to workplace project coordination and self-managed operational workflows.

title: hREA: Scalable Distributed Framework for Economic Network Coordination
note: Distributed economic coordination framework relevant to peer-to-peer property, vendor, and service network concepts.
